description_long: This is a bright red biplane with two stacked wings, each adorned with white stripes and blue-and-white star roundels, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers toward the tail, which features a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with matching red and white striping. The nose houses a visible piston engine with a wooden propeller and exposed cylinders, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield and a simple seat visible. The wings are supported by wooden struts and tension wires, giving the aircraft a classic, vintage appearance. The overall construction suggests a lightweight frame, likely made of metal and wood, with fabric-covered wings and tail surfaces.
description: A vintage red biplane with white stripes, blue star roundels, an open cockpit, and a wooden propeller. Features dual stacked wings, exposed engine, and classic landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, open cockpit, dual wings with star roundels, and the wooden propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, exposed engine cylinders, and the symmetrical arrangement of the biplane's wings and landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the tail section and the open cockpit behind the upper wing.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the stacked wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts and wires; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with exposed cylinders and a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage with a small windshield.
